summary: Photo Progression System - Iteration 95. All features verified: 1) Minting fee changed to 200 BL (confirmed in API and UI), 2) Full-stats endpoint returns all new fields (stars, star_bonus_value, age_days, age_bonus_value, reaction_bonus_value, bl_coins_spent, seniority_achieved, seniority_bonus_value, levels_to_seniority, xp_progress, xp_progress_percent, xp_to_next_level, total_dollar_value), 3) XP progress calculation working correctly, 4) UnifiedPhotoCard displays all new stats on back of card, 5) Card view mode shows flip functionality with 'Tap to flip' buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Full-stats endpoint at /api/minting/photo/{mint_id}/full-stats returns all new progression fields
✅ calculate_age_bonus(), calculate_star_bonus(), calculate_reaction_bonus(), calculate_seniority_bonus() functions implemented
✅ UnifiedPhotoCard.jsx displays XP meter bar with shimmer animation below Base Value
✅ New stats section (Stars, Level, Age, Reactions, BL Coins, Seniority) displayed below Authenticity
✅ GoldenSparklingFrame component implemented for Level 60 Seniority
✅ MintPhotoDialog fetches mint_cost_bl from /api/minting/config and displays '200 BL'
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 12 minted photos
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo Progression System VERIFIED. Key features: 1) Mint cost = 200 BL, 2) Full-stats API returns all new fields including stars, age_days, reaction_bonus_value, seniority_achieved, xp_progress, 3) UnifiedPhotoCard shows XP meter bar with percentage and shimmer animation, 4) New stats section below Authenticity shows Stars, Level, Age, Reactions, BL Coins, Seniority, 5) Golden Sparkling Frame animation implemented for Level 60 Seniority (needs Level 60 photo to test visually).

backend_pytest.test_dollar_value_totals_with_bonuses: PASSED - Verifies total_dollar_value includes all bonuses
backend_pytest.test_level_bonuses_endpoint: PASSED - Verifies level-bonuses returns Level 60 with golden_frame=true
backend_pytest.test_mint_status_shows_200_bl_cost: PASSED - Verifies mint status for authenticated user

frontend_browser_automation.minted_photos_page: PASSED - Shows 12 photos with $4.51B portfolio value
frontend_browser_automation.back_of_card_stats: PASSED - All 10 stat sections found (Base Value, XP, Authenticity, Stars, Level, Age, Reactions, BL Coins, Seniority, Photo Stats)
